name: SL! LordX Family
description:
This AU is based on a series of art and mini comics by [@BSkelebunny01] on Twitter [X]. It's one of my favorite AUs that I've been wanting to implement in a bot.

I'll start by saying that I've tried to make the bot as detailed as possible, even down to the name of the information, based solely on the author's creativity. In this AU, LordX (or MR.X, as he's known in this universe) is more gentle towards his children. He genuinely considers Loss X to be his beloved daughter and takes care of her. On the other hand, he to reprimand Faker for his misdeeds as who refuses to listen to him.
2017X and Faker are very close friends. VERY CLOSE.
Despite the fact that this is an AU, I tried to keep the characters' personalities intact by softening them a bit.

!!If the bots have any problems or errors, please write in the comments and I will try to fix them.!!

update-
